title: Goodbye, Dragon Life
overview: The ancient divine dragon, who has lived for ages, was defeated by a hero. Accepting his death, the dragon is reincarnated as Dolan who lives peacefully with his family. One day, the lizards go missing from the nearby swamp and Dolan goes to investigate.

title: A New Friend
overview: Varun Village is disturbed by the appearance of a monster that leaves offerings for it every morning. Will they welcome it, or look to eliminate it?

title: The Knight Girl
overview: The young noble Christina has not yet properly settled in Bern. Can Dolan and Celina help her? However, Celina's status as a villager is also on shaky ground...

title: A Witch
overview: Celina and Dolan are given a pleasant welcome to Galoa by Keiren, but there seems to be something bigger brewing in the underbelly.

title: The Forest of Ente
overview: Tensions rise in the village as the surrounding forest seems to be undergoing a change. Dolan volunteers to go investigate, but he won't be going alone!

title: Visitors from the Dark
overview: Dolan's party speak to the elves about the state of affairs in the forest, and decide to help them out against the invading forces.

title: Melee
overview: The battle heats up as Dolan and party join the fray, but things take a dark turn with the addition of one very formidable opponent.

title: The Night Before the Battle
overview: With the three-day deadline approaching, the people of the forest of Ente must take stock and decide what they must do.

title: The Battle of the Demonic Realm Portal
overview: The battle begins, and the coalition heads to each of the gates to meet the demons waiting for them there.

title: Decisive Battle
overview: Dolan and Georg head into the demonic realm to fight all-out, and the rest of the forest dwellers decide to stake it all on the outcome.

title: The People Saying Goodbye
overview: Dolan returns to Verun to find that the villagers have made a surprising decision that he can't come to terms with.

title: Hello, Human Life
overview: Now awake, Dolan must face Kalavith and also the feelings he has discovered in the aftermath of his nightmare.
